page: Google Cloud Platform m2-ultramem-208 is an x86_64 architecture memory-optimized server designed for large-scale workloads requiring massive memory capacity. It features 208 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon processors running at 2.7 GHz, mapped to 104 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. The system is equipped with 5.75 TB (5888.0 GB) of RAM, providing 28.31 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs.

Benchmark results highlight a clear tradeoff between single-core and multi-core performance. While single-core metrics, such as stress-ng single-core and Geekbench single-core scores, fall into the bottom 25%, the server excels in highly parallelized tasks. Multi-core stress-ng performance and Passmark CPU extended instructions tests rank in the top 10%. Memory bandwidth is a key strength, with cached read-only small block bandwidth reaching a top-tier 10,166.66 GB/sec, and large block read/write operations showing strong performance.

The server demonstrates exceptional capabilities in specific transactional and processing workloads, achieving top-tier performance in Redis SET operations with 147.67 million operations per second. However, its single-threaded performance limits its efficiency in sequential tasks like gzip compression and bzip3 decompression. Given its massive memory footprint and high resource density, this server is qualitatively positioned as a high-end resource for enterprise-grade in-memory databases, large-scale data processing, and memory-intensive enterprise applications.
description: Google Cloud Platform m2-ultramem-208 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server configured with 208 dedicated vCPUs and 5.75 TB of RAM. Powered by 2.7 GHz Intel Xeon processors across 104 physical cores, this instance delivers 28.31 GB of memory per core. It contains no local storage or GPUs. While single-core benchmarks are weak, the server achieves top-tier multi-core CPU performance and exceptional memory bandwidth, reaching 10,166.66 GB/sec for cached reads. It also demonstrates top-tier efficiency in Redis SET operations, making it highly suitable for massive in-memory databases and heavy parallel data processing. The processor supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and AES cryptography, enhancing its utility for secure, high-throughput enterprise applications.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform m2-ultramem-208 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring 208 dedicated vCPUs, 5.75 TB of RAM, and top-tier multi-core and memory bandwidth performance.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform m2-ultramem-208 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server with 208 vCPUs, 5.75 TB RAM, and top-tier multi-core performance.
tagline: A high-capacity memory-optimized server featuring massive RAM and exceptional multi-core throughput for parallelized enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 208 dedicated vCPUs and 5.75 TB of RAM providing 28.31 GB per core
Top-tier multi-core CPU and cached memory bandwidth performance
Excellent throughput for Redis SET operations at 147.67 million ops/sec
Intel Xeon x86_64 architecture with 104 physical cores and hyper-threading
Best suited for massive in-memory databases and parallel data processing
